subject: Ecology
title: What Is Ecology?
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on What Is Ecology?.

hook.text: Ecology is not about recycling or saving whales—it's the science of how life connects.

buildup.text: The word comes from Greek 'oikos,' meaning home. Ecology studies life's household.

discovery.text: Ecologists track how organisms interact with each other and their environment.

twist.text: A change in one species can cascade through an entire ecosystem unpredictably.

climax.text: When wolves returned to Yellowstone, they changed river paths by scaring elk from banks.

punchline.text: It's the science of who needs whom.

quiz.question: What does ecology study?
options: How organisms interact with each other and their environment
How to protect endangered species only
